title: tithymalus telephioides
intro: Tithymalus telephioides, also known as the Telephium or Euphorbia telephioides, is a perennial plant species in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to the mountains of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems contain compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
